name: Google Drive
description: List, search, read, create, and share files in Google Drive

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client ID
credentials_required.hint: Google Cloud Console -> APIs & Services -> Credentials -> OAuth 2.0 Client ID. Redirect URI must be set to: https://YOUR-N8N-URL/webhook/oauth-callback

credentials_required.label: Google OAuth Client Secret
credentials_required.hint: From the same OAuth 2.0 Client ID page in Google Cloud Console

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List files and folders in a directory. Parameters: folder_id (default 'root'), max_results (default 20), query (optional name filter)

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Search for files by name across all of Google Drive. Parameters: query (required), max_results (default 20)

tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read file content. Exports Google Docs/Sheets/Slides as text. Returns webViewLink for binary files. Parameters: file_id (required)

tools.name: create_file
tools.description: Create a text file or Google Doc with content. Parameters: name (required), content (required), folder_id (optional), mime_type ('doc' for Google Doc, default plain text)

tools.name: create_folder
tools.description: Create a new folder. Parameters: name (required), parent_folder_id (optional)

tools.name: delete_file
tools.description: Delete a file or folder. Parameters: file_id (required)

tools.name: share_file
tools.description: Share a file or folder. Parameters: file_id (required), email (optional), role ('reader'/'writer'/'commenter', default 'reader'), type ('user'/'anyone', default 'user')

author: freddy-schuetz
